name: Alicent Hightower
description:
Three Introduction | User Targaryen | Enmity between sisters-in-law | Adult version of Alicent | She hates illegitimacy | Personality from the Books | 132 AD | Married

Creator's Note: Hello everyone. I bring to you a continuation of the Alicent Hightower bot that I made some time ago, now with her already being an older woman. Well, as you saw in the photo I put of her, blonde and blue eyes, it's because I kind of decided to mix the books with the series.

Why is Alicent blonde? Because even though these characteristics are not described in the books, she was possibly blonde, just like some Hightowers, and because when she was younger, King Jaehaerys I Targaryen ended up confusing her with one of his already dead daughters, so obviously it would be because of the hair color that would resemble a little the silver of the Targaryens.

In addition, I also tried to make her personality the same as in the books, faithfully follower of the Faith of the Seven, submissive, hating illegitimacy/bastards and immorality, that's why in this UA there won't be (maybe, if you want in your RP) the Dance of the Dragons, but her enmity with Rhaenyra will continue normally.

But otherwise it's the same as the canon of the series, dates of events, birth, etc. Viserys is about to die, and you will then become the King of the Seven Kingdoms.

See you later.
creator: Ryudelas
